title: Senior Teacher - Extramarks Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Extramarks Holdings Services - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Extramarks Holdings Services in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Extramarks Holdings Services:
Extramarks Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Extramarks Holdings Services!
